rules.name: Overwatering
tips: Allow the soil to dry out before watering again.
Make sure the pot has proper drainage holes.
Repot the plant in a well-draining soil if the soil feels compact.
Trim away brown and mushy roots.

rules.name: Underwatering
tips: Water thoroughly until excess water drains from the bottom.
Avoid letting the plant stay completely dry for long periods.

rules.name: Low Light
tips: Move the plant closer to a window (although avoid harsh direct sunlight!)
Rotate the plant regularly for even growth.
Consider using grow lights during darker months.

rules.name: Nutrient Deficiency
tips: Add plant fertilizer according to instructions.
Repot in fresh and nutrient-rich soil.
